ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Specific job title of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  "last_satisfaction_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last satisfaction survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "head_of_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the department */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the department was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluation_rating" REAL /* Rating given in the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person conducting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" INTEGER /* Type of evaluation (e.g., self-assessment, peer review, manager evaluation) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or remarks provided during the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the evaluation period */,
  "evaluation_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the evaluation period */,
  "goals_achieved" INTEGER /* Number of goals achieved by the employee */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Specific areas where the employee needs improvement */,
  "performance_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated action plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluation_type FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_type") REFERENCES evaluation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_performance_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_plan_id") REFERENCES action_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" INTEGER /* Type of feedback (e.g., peer, manager, anonymous) */,
  "feedback_comment" TEXT /* Comments or remarks provided in the feedback */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the feedback period */,
  "feedback_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the feedback period */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback */,
  "impact_rating" TEXT /* Impact rating of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_feedback_type FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_type") REFERENCES feedback_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_indices" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction index entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "satisfaction_date" TEXT /* Date the satisfaction index was recorded */,
  "satisfaction_index" REAL /* Satisfaction index score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or remarks related to the satisfaction index */,
  "satisfaction_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the satisfaction survey period */,
  "satisfaction_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the satisfaction survey period */,
  "satisfaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the satisfaction survey */,
  "satisfaction_trend" TEXT /* Trend of satisfaction over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satisfaction_indices_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action plan */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee for whom the action plan is developed */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* Date the action plan was created */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the action plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action plan (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for completing the action plan */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who created the action plan */,
  "approved_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the action plan */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the action plan was approved */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the action plan was last updated */,
  "completion_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of completion of the action plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_plans_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_plans_approved_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_plans_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
